data.title: In week 3 2025, Eimskip bought 85,000 shares for ISK 22,780,000 as part of a share buy-back program.
data.description: During the third week of 2025, Eimskip acquired 85,000 of its own shares for a total purchase price of ISK 22,780,000.

data.title: WIF price predicted to hit $0.43 by Feb with 26% upside potential, facing challenges at $0.28 support amid mixed signals.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Dogwifhat (WIF) is forecasted to have a potential increase of 26%, reaching $0.43 in the coming weeks. However, the current downward trend in the market poses immediate obstacles, with a support level at $0.28. The short-term price prediction suggests caution in trading decisions.

data.title: Amrop establishes new office in Lithuania to strengthen presence and services in the Baltic region.
data.description: On January 19, 2026, Amrop, a worldwide leadership advisory and executive search organization, unveiled a revised operational framework and management configuration in Lithuania. This move aims to enhance its influence and service offerings in the Baltic region. The initiative showcases Amrop's commitment to expanding its reach and resources to better serve clients in the area.

data.title: Three Sweden partners with Ericsson to launch commercial 5G SA network, benefiting subscribers and enterprises in urban areas.
data.description: Ericsson is providing a fully-operational 5G Standalone (SA) network from start to finish, featuring cloud-native 5G Core and Radio Access Network (RAN) solutions. The network will be utilized by Three Sweden and its customer base to access enhanced mobile connectivity services. This initiative will specifically benefit users and businesses located in urban regions, offering advanced 5G capabilities. The focus is on improving services for both individual subscribers and enterprises, reinforcing the commitment to urban connectivity.

data.title: Bang & Olufsen completed share buyback programme on August 15, 2025, to support incentive programs.
data.description: Bang & Olufsen disclosed on August 15, 2025, its launch of a share repurchase plan aimed at supporting the firm's share-focused long-term incentive schemes.

data.title: Forecasting HBAR to hit $0.16 by month-end despite obstacles. Current price at $0.11, up 45%. Technicals are mixed.
data.description: An analysis of HBAR price forecasts suggests a possible 45% increase to $0.16 by the end of the month, despite the current bearish trend at $0.11. Technical indicators present a combination of signals, with the Relative Strength Index (RSI) showing a neutral outlook.

data.title: Bitcoin futures open interest increases by 13% as risk appetite cautiously returns; recovery seen after Q4 deleveraging.
data.description: The open interest for Bitcoin futures has started to rise in January following a significant deleveraging in Q4. Despite this recovery, analysts believe the increase is still moderate.

data.title: GCL SI partners with Ocean Sun for a floating solar project at Soneva Secret resort in Maldives, utilizing over 4,200 TOPCon modules.
data.description: In Suzhou, China on January 19, 2026, GCL System Integration (GCL SI) disclosed the achievement of their collaborative floating solar energy endeavor with Ocean Sun for the Soneva Secret resort in Maldives. The project boasts over 4,200 TOPCon solar panels, showcasing their successful initiative in renewable energy development.

data.title: By February 2026, BCH price may reach $720-750, short-term target $607-624, with critical support at $568.
data.description: Summary of Bitcoin Cash (BCH) Price Predictions: In the short term (1 week), the price is expected to reach between $607 and $624. Looking further ahead to the medium term (1 month), forecasts put the price in the $720-$750 range. A bullish breakout level is identified at $625, while critical support is seen at $568. These projections suggest potential fluctuations in BCH value, with a focus on key price levels for investors to monitor.

data.title: TRX trading at $0.32 may hit $0.35 target as RSI overbought at 71.41. Analysts see $0.32-$0.35 potential despite resistance.
data.description: The cryptocurrency TRON (TRX) is currently priced at $0.32, with the Relative Strength Index (RSI) at 71.41 indicating overbought conditions. Analysts predict a trading range of $0.32 to $0.35 based on technical analysis, though there is a risk of a short-term pullback due to resistance levels.

data.title: Tri-Union Seafoods warns consumers of more recalled Genova Tuna due to distribution error from Feb. 2025, at limited retailers.
data.description: Tri-Union Seafoods, based in El Segundo, Calif., issued a warning to customers on Jan. 16, 2026, regarding a third-party distributor's mistake in releasing previously quarantined products linked to a recall from February 2025. The recall was initiated voluntarily after being informed about issues concerning our products.

data.title: North European Oil Royalty Trust's Managing Director retires on Jan 30, 2026. Interim director appointed.
data.description: Keene, New Hampshire - On January 16, 2026, Mr. John R. Van Kirk, Managing Director of North European Oil Royalty Trust (NYSE: NRT), announced his retirement effective January 30, 2026. The Trust oversees oil royalties and operates within the financial sector. This transition marks a significant change for the company, which manages investments related to oil revenue. With Mr. Van Kirk stepping down, the Trust will undergo restructuring to fill the vacancy left by his departure. The retirement of a key figure like Mr. Van Kirk may impact the performance and direction of the Trust, which holds a notable position in the market with its stock listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the symbol NRT.
StandardAero Set to Join S&P MidCap 400

data.title: Lightera introduced a program integrating fiber-optic temperature sensing for safer medical procedures. Booths at BiOS and Photonics West display the innovation.
data.description: Today, in San Francisco, Lightera, a prominent provider of specialized optical fiber solutions, unveiled a new initiative at BiOS, Hall D Booth #8430, and Photonics West Hall F Booth #4505. This program integrates real-time temperature sensing using fiber optics. This innovation aims to revolutionize temperature monitoring and facilitate advanced applications.
